summary: Tested MOSSERO Stripe checkout integration (real Stripe sk_test_emergent via emergentintegrations). 10/10 backend pytest tests pass and full frontend e2e flow verified: Cart → POST /api/checkout/session → redirect to checkout.stripe.com URL → /cart/success polling page → graceful 'Still processing' timeout state (since test session cannot be auto-completed). Empty cart, unknown slug, unknown session, and missing-session error states all behave correctly.

minor.issue: Empty items list returns 400 with detail='Cart is empty' (acceptable). Pydantic also accepts the empty list without 422 since min_length is not set on List[CartItem] — consider adding min_length=1 on items for stricter validation.

Carry-over from iteration 1: `logger` is referenced inside /api/contact before logging.basicConfig+getLogger(__name__) block (line 36-40) — actually OK because logger is module-level, but the order is fine since logger is defined before route registration via app.include_router. Re-verified: no NameError. Iteration 1's concern is no longer applicable; logger IS defined before app.include_router.

action_items: (Optional) Add min_length=1 constraint to CheckoutSessionCreate.items so an empty cart returns a clean 422 from pydantic instead of relying on total<=0 to raise 400.

(Optional) /api/checkout/status currently returns amount_total as int cents from cached DB path but as whatever Stripe returns from the live path — both end up integers; just confirm contract is documented.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/checkout/status correctly excludes Mongo _id via projection {'_id': 0} — good.

Graceful fallback in /api/checkout/status (try/except around stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status) is implemented exactly as spec and verified: 8 consecutive polls all returned 200 with payment_status='initiated' instead of 500.

POST /api/checkout/session uses request.base_url for webhook URL construction inside _build_stripe, but in create_checkout_session it uses req.origin_url. Inconsistency is minor — webhook_url is informational for emergentintegrations init.
metadata in CheckoutSessionRequest receives customer_email/name as plain strings — fine. No PII leakage to client because metadata isn't echoed back.
Cart context clear() is only called from /cart/success on payment_status='paid' (clearedRef guards double-clear). Matches spec — cart is NOT cleared on submit, only on confirmed paid.
Frontend MAX_POLL_ATTEMPTS=8 at 2s interval = 16s max polling before timeout state — observed to work correctly. Timeout copy 'Still processing' shows as expected.
All required data-testids present and verified: checkout-success-polling, checkout-timeout, checkout-error, order-confirmation, order-id, checkout-name/email/address/submit, checkout-modal.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app. /app/memory/test_credentials.md not present.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed records in MongoDB collections: payment_transactions (3 docs per run), contact_messages (1 doc per run). No cleanup automated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe checkout uses emergentintegrations with sk_test_emergent. KNOWN PLATFORM QUIRK: get_checkout_status raises 'No such checkout.session' for freshly-created sessions — the /api/checkout/status endpoint wraps this in try/except and returns cached DB state with payment_status='initiated' and HTTP 200. This is intentional, NOT a bug. Webhook is source of truth. Frontend success page polls 8 times then shows 'Still processing' timeout state. To trigger 'paid' state you'd need a real Stripe webhook hit (not possible in this preview env). Verified stripe URL pattern: https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_...
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issues found. All 11 listed test cases in the request pass.
